description: Softlogic Life Insurance PLC Vs. The Commissioner General of Labour and Others before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Softlogic Life Insurance PLC Vs. The Commissioner General of Labour and Others
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: An application by the insurance agent was made to the Labour Commissioner, who decided that the insurance agent is entitled to a salary on the basis that he is an employee of the insurer and not on contractual basis. The same was challenged in this Writ Court; Writ of Certiorari issued, quashing the said order on the basis that it is irrational, illegal, and against the evidence
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
